message:
refactor(storage,deploy): migrate from rusqlite to frankensqlite, update Cloudflare deploy test

Storage migration (src/storage/sqlite.rs):
- Replace Connection::open/open_with_flags with
  FrankenConnection::open/open_franken_with_flags
- Replace conn.query_row(sql, [], |row| row.get(N)) with
  conn.query_row_map(sql, &[], |row| row.get_typed(N))
- Replace conn.execute(sql, []) with conn.execute(sql) (no empty params)
- Replace tx.execute(sql, params![...]) with
  tx.execute_compat(sql, fparams![...])
- Replace rusqlite::types::Value with ParamValue/SqliteValue::Null
- Replace rusqlite::params_from_iter with param_slice_to_values
- tx.last_insert_rowid() now returns Result (needs ?)
- Replace conn.busy_timeout(Duration) with PRAGMA busy_timeout=5000
- Change fn signatures from &mut Connection to &FrankenConnection
- PricingTable::load delegates to franken_load
- Replace conn.prepare + stmt.query_map patterns with
  conn.query_map_collect

Cloudflare deploy test (tests/deploy_cloudflare.rs):
- New test_prerequisites_ready_with_api_credentials_without_wrangler
  asserting API credentials alone are sufficient for direct deploy
- Auth-state combination table updated: wrangler no longer required
  when API creds are present

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
